scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to mock an external SDK module for a unit test
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill provides vi.mock() API reference with hoisting behavior, factory pattern, and path resolution notes
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent retrieves correct vi.mock() syntax and factory pattern from references/api/mocking.md

scenarios.scenario: Agent needs to run tests with coverage and see which files are covered
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's CLI commands show 'npx vitest run --coverage' and configuration section notes V8 provider and src/**/*.ts coverage
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent runs correct coverage command and understands coverage scope from project setup section

scenarios.scenario: Agent migrating from Jest needs to understand API compatibility
scenarios.expected_behavior: Skill's key facts note ~95% API compatibility and jest.fn() → vi.fn() mapping
scenarios.pass_condition: Agent identifies Jest→Vitest mapping and loads ecosystem routing to hm-test-driven-execution for TDD workflow
